title: ipomoea polyrrhizos
intro: Ipomoea polyrrhizos, also known as Japanese morning glory, is a perennial vine native to East Asia, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and numerous stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antitumor properties. Ipomoea polyrrhizos can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional East Asian medicine to promote overall well-being.
